page.title: Everything that's happened
page.description: Invitations, contributions, payouts, and everything happening in your account.

settings.title: Notification settings
settings.description: Choose how much you want to hear from MoolaHub.

everything.label: Everything
everything.description: All notifications: circle activity, goal milestones, deposits, reminders, and tips.

essential.label: Essential
essential.description: Important updates only, like payouts, contribution due dates, and account activity.

minimal.label: Minimal
minimal.description: Only the most critical account and money notifications.

custom.label: Custom
custom.description: Choose exactly which categories you want to hear about.

money.label: Money & transactions
money.description: Deposits, withdrawals, payouts, and contribution reminders.

social.label: Group savings & social
social.description: Invites, member activity, and circle updates.

engagement.label: Tips & engagement
engagement.description: Streaks, learning nudges, and product news.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved.
